character.name: mage_chef
character.prompt: A chibi girl chef with wavy purple bob hair and small round glasses. She wears a light purple chef dress (color #cc88ff) with white puff sleeves and a dark apron vest overlay. Has a small white flower hair pin and a small white chef hat. Calm and intellectual expression. Holds a whisk or piping bag in right hand. Elegant dessert chef appearance. Low top-down view, 8 directions, chibi proportions.
